title: Kernera auriculata

This family comprises various flowering plant species, including those from the genera Brassica and Arabidopsis. Kernera auriculata is a species of flowering plant within the genus Kernera. The genus Kernera is closely related to the genus Erysimum and shares similarities with other Brassicaceae members. Kernera auriculata is native to the Old World and has been naturalized in other regions.
